# Phase-01 — Enterprise Architecture Foundations

> Think and communicate like an enterprise architect: frameworks, governance, and decisions.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 4-6**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Enterprise Architecture Foundations](01_Enterprise_Architecture_Foundations.prompt.md) | `Enterprise_Architecture_Foundations.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Architecture Governance](02_Architecture_Governance.prompt.md) | `Architecture_Governance.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 03 | [Architecture Decision Records](03_Architecture_Decision_Records.prompt.md) | `Architecture_Decision_Records.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 04 | [Solution Architecture Practice](04_Solution_Architecture_Practice.prompt.md) | `Solution_Architecture_Practice.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [Domain Driven Design](05_Domain_Driven_Design.prompt.md) | `Domain_Driven_Design.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [Business Capability Modeling](06_Business_Capability_Modeling.prompt.md) | `Business_Capability_Modeling.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 07 | [Technical Strategy and Roadmaps](07_Technical_Strategy_and_Roadmaps.prompt.md) | `Technical_Strategy_and_Roadmaps.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
